title: PieHole Plain
description: PieHole Plain is a 16x16 resource pack updated to the latest version of Minecraft. The original was created by Alex Voelk for Minecraft 1.0 back in November 2011.
body:
![The Piehole Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde0353a3966e2f963fe9424d8cf132290e01111.gif)

PieHole Plain is a 16x16 resource pack updated to the latest version of Minecraft. The original was created by Alex Voelk for Minecraft 1.0 back in November 2011. [http://piehole.alexvoelk.de/](https://piehole.alexvoelk.de/)

Please feel free to submit your PR's to help rebuild this beautiful texture pack.
[https://github.com/james090500/PieholePlain](https://github.com/james090500/PieholePlain)

**Progress is about 90% complete. There are still some blocks and mobs which need updating**
